name: instant-api — backup.requested with no follow-up within 30m [stuck backup]
description: Warn when a backup.requested event has no matching backup.succeeded or backup.failed event for the same backup_id within 30 minutes. A stuck request usually means the worker that runs the actual snapshot crashed mid-flight — without this alert the customer first learns when they try to restore. Source: audit events emitted by api/internal/handlers/backup.go (W5-B-api); the join uses backup_id which is included on all three events.

nrql.query: SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind = 'backup.requested' AND backup_id NOT IN (SELECT uniques(backup_id) FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind IN ('backup.succeeded', 'backup.failed') SINCE 35 minutes ago)
